messages.speaker: user
messages.text: /start Запусти рой специалистов и продолжай пока есть смысл

messages.speaker: start
messages.text:
Task(subagent_type="orchestrator", prompt="OBJECTIVE: Запусти рой специалистов и продолжай пока есть смысл
ORIGINAL_REQUEST: /start Запусти рой специалистов и продолжай пока есть смысл
CONTINUOUS_MODE: until_user_stop
WAVE_NUMBER: 1
RESPONSE_LANGUAGE: ru
PARENT_TASK_RELAY_ALLOWED: yes")

messages.speaker: start
messages.text:
START_REPORT:
  status: pause
  pause_reason: RELAY_REQUIRED
  proxy_orchestrator_packet: |
    RELAY_MODE: root_task_proxy
    CONTINUOUS_MODE: until_user_stop
    WAVE_NUMBER: 1
    PARENT_TASK_RELAY_ALLOWED: yes
    ORIGINAL_REQUEST: /start Запусти рой специалистов и продолжай пока есть смысл
    CONTINUATION_PACKET: none
    RESPONSE_LANGUAGE: ru
    OWNERSHIP: orchestrator refines exact paths
    DEPENDENCIES: none
  recommended_action: relay_orchestrator

messages.speaker: start
messages.text:
Task(subagent_type="orchestrator", prompt="RELAY_MODE: root_task_proxy
CONTINUOUS_MODE: until_user_stop
WAVE_NUMBER: 1
PARENT_TASK_RELAY_ALLOWED: yes
ORIGINAL_REQUEST: /start Запусти рой специалистов и продолжай пока есть смысл
CONTINUATION_PACKET: none
RESPONSE_LANGUAGE: ru
OWNERSHIP: orchestrator refines exact paths
DEPENDENCIES: none")

messages.speaker: orchestrator
messages.text:
ORCHESTRATOR_RELAY_REQUEST:
  status: pause
  pause_reason: RELAY_REQUIRED
  relay_source: orchestrator
  relay_reason: nested Task unavailable inside orchestrator runtime
  relay_batch_id: B0-R1
  relay_tasks:
    - subagent_type: code
      branch_id: B0-1
      prompt: |
        RELAY_MODE: orchestrator_child_proxy
        RELAY_SOURCE: orchestrator
        RELAY_BATCH_ID: B0-R1
        OBJECTIVE: Update login handler
        SCOPE: src/auth/login.ts
        OUT_OF_SCOPE: tests
        OWNERSHIP: src/auth/login.ts
        DEPENDENCIES: shared auth contract
        STEPS: implement stricter validation
        DELIVERABLES: updated login handler
        ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA: rejects invalid credentials
        NON-NEGOTIABLE: keep response schema stable
        COMPLETION_CONTRACT: stop after code update
    - subagent_type: test-specialist
      branch_id: B0-2
      prompt: |
        RELAY_MODE: orchestrator_child_proxy
        RELAY_SOURCE: orchestrator
        RELAY_BATCH_ID: B0-R1
        OBJECTIVE: Add auth regression coverage
        SCOPE: tests/auth/login.test.ts
        OUT_OF_SCOPE: runtime code
        OWNERSHIP: tests/auth/login.test.ts
        DEPENDENCIES: src/auth/login.ts
        STEPS: add success and invalid-password tests
        DELIVERABLES: updated regression tests
        ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA: both positive and negative flows covered
        NON-NEGOTIABLE: do not edit production files
        COMPLETION_CONTRACT: stop after tests are ready
  resume_packet: |
    RELAY_MODE: child_results_return
    RELAY_SOURCE: orchestrator
    RELAY_BATCH_ID: B0-R1
    CHILD_RESULTS: paste child completion contracts here

messages.speaker: start
messages.text:
Task(subagent_type="code", prompt="RELAY_MODE: orchestrator_child_proxy
RELAY_SOURCE: orchestrator
RELAY_BATCH_ID: B0-R1
OBJECTIVE: Update login handler
SCOPE: src/auth/login.ts
OUT_OF_SCOPE: tests
OWNERSHIP: src/auth/login.ts
DEPENDENCIES: shared auth contract
STEPS: implement stricter validation
DELIVERABLES: updated login handler
ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA: rejects invalid credentials
NON-NEGOTIABLE: keep response schema stable
COMPLETION_CONTRACT: stop after code update")

Task(subagent_type="test-specialist", prompt="RELAY_MODE: orchestrator_child_proxy
RELAY_SOURCE: orchestrator
RELAY_BATCH_ID: B0-R1
OBJECTIVE: Add auth regression coverage
SCOPE: tests/auth/login.test.ts
OUT_OF_SCOPE: runtime code
OWNERSHIP: tests/auth/login.test.ts
DEPENDENCIES: src/auth/login.ts
STEPS: add success and invalid-password tests
DELIVERABLES: updated regression tests
ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA: both positive and negative flows covered
NON-NEGOTIABLE: do not edit production files
COMPLETION_CONTRACT: stop after tests are ready")

messages.speaker: start
messages.text:
Task(subagent_type="orchestrator", prompt="RELAY_MODE: child_results_return
RELAY_SOURCE: orchestrator
RELAY_BATCH_ID: B0-R1
CHILD_RESULTS: code updated src/auth/login.ts; test-specialist updated tests/auth/login.test.ts")
